message:
feat(fnp-python): k74v.1 close 42 ufunc passthroughs + family oracle

Closes franken_numpy-k74v.1 reality-check. Adds 42 numpy ufunc
passthrough wrappers via the existing core_numpy_passthrough helper
(variadic *args, **kwargs so the full numpy ufunc surface — out=,
where=, dtype=, casting=, subok= — passes through without re-typing).

Trig (Array-API aliases): acos, acosh, asin, asinh, atan, atan2,
atanh, tan.

Bitwise (11): bitwise_and, bitwise_count, bitwise_invert,
bitwise_left_shift, bitwise_not, bitwise_or, bitwise_right_shift,
bitwise_xor, left_shift, right_shift, gcd, lcm.

Comparison (6): equal, not_equal, greater, greater_equal, less,
less_equal.

Logical (4): logical_and, logical_not, logical_or, logical_xor.

Elementwise min/max (4): fmax, fmin, maximum, minimum.

Arithmetic (4): float_power, divmod, mod (via py_mod with name=),
remainder.

Datetime (1): isnat.

Reductions (1): ptp.

Matrix gufuncs (2): vecmat, matvec.

Registered in module init; extends module_exports_python_surface to
cover all 43 new exports. Adds
k74v_1_ufunc_passthroughs_match_numpy_family_oracles as family-level
parity oracle — one canonical case per family (trig, bitwise, compare,
logical, elementwise min/max, modular arithmetic, datetime, matrix
gufunc) asserting numpy.array_equal between our passthrough and
numpy's canonical attribute.

Workspace: 3741 passed under parallel cargo test.
